response: Hey everyone, I'm Logan! I'm pretty adventurous and love getting people talking—I'm not one to sit quietly when there's a mystery to solve. I'll be watching closely and sharing my thoughts as we go.

Hi, I'm Indigo. I tend to be quieter in groups, but I'll keep my eyes open and share what I notice when it feels right. I get a bit anxious in tense situations, but I trust we can work through this together.

Hey everyone, I'm Casey! I'm the type who jumps right into the action and isn't afraid to stir things up if it means getting to the truth. You'll probably hear me debating and pushing for answers, because sitting back just isn't my style.

Hey everyone, I'm Alex! I'm pretty outgoing and love keeping the conversation flowing—I'd rather be in the thick of things than lurking in the background. I'll definitely speak my mind when something doesn't sit right, so get ready for some loud opinions.

Hey everyone, I'm Ellis. I tend to be more of a methodical type—I like to listen first, think things through, and speak up when I have something solid to add. I'm hoping we can keep the discussions clear and focused so we don't waste time on unnecessary drama.

Hi everyone, I'm Kennedy! I'm pretty easygoing and like to keep things cooperative—I think we'll figure this out better if we stay organized and trust each other. I'll be paying close attention and weighing things carefully before making any big calls.

Hey everyone, I'm Gray. I'm pretty level-headed and like to stay calm, even when things get tense—I'd rather think things through methodically than rush to conclusions. I'll be watching carefully and weighing the evidence before I make any decisions.

Indigo's quieter but observant, which could be dangerous if they're the Doctor. I'd say kill Logan to cut off a potential leader before he gains too much influence.

ACTION: Kill Logan

Logan is the most outgoing and vocal so far, which makes him a real threat to the Mafia—he'll likely drive conversation and push for accusations. The Doctor is hardest to read at this point, but Indigo or Gray seem like candidates given their quieter, watchful styles. Killing Logan early removes a strong voice and increases our chances of controlling the narrative.
